Annexure -I: Hostel Rules and Policies 
 
All hostel residents are expected to strictly adhere to the Hostel Rules and Hostel Policies, 
available on the hostel website (https://hostel.iiti.ac.in/). Any violation will invite disciplinary 
action as outlined below. Repeated offences will result in escalated penalties and, where 
applicable, parental involvement. 
 
1 Late Entry (Returning to Institute After 11:30 PM) [with a Reset Period*] 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First and Second Instances Gentle reminders 
Third Instance 
Written apology 
Fourth Instance 
Parents will be informed 
Fifth Instance 
Parents will be informed + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be called + penalty will be doubled w.r.t the 
previous instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 500 
*Reset period: Beginning of each academic semester. 
 
2 Cooking Inside Hostel Units 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Written apology + confiscation of utensils& 
Second Instance

*Reset period: Beginning of each academic semester. 
 
2 Cooking Inside Hostel Units 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Written apology + confiscation of utensils& 
Second Instance 
Monetary penalty*& 
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be informed + penalty will be doubled w.r.t the 
previous instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 500 
&Confiscated items will not be returned and may be disposed of by the institution as deemed 
appropriate. The items may be returned to the owner only under certain circumstances. 
 
3 Unauthorized Furniture Shifting or Damage to Hostel Property 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Monetary penalty$ (For common usage furniture, the penalty 
amount will be collected from all unit residents.) 
Subsequent Instances 
Penalty will be doubled w.r.t the previous instance 
$Penalty amount: Actual amount of the damage (as decided by the institute) + ₹ 500 
 
4 Trespassing in Undesignated Areas 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance

$Penalty amount: Actual amount of the damage (as decided by the institute) + ₹ 500 
 
4 Trespassing in Undesignated Areas 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Written apology + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be informed + penalty will be doubled w.r.t the 
previous instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 1000

Page | 2  
 
5. (i) Feeding of any animal (including but not limited to dogs, cats, monkeys, or birds) is 
strictly prohibited in undesignated areas, including the Hostel Premises and Eateries 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Written apology + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Penalty will be doubled w.r.t the previous instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 1000 
 
5. (ii) Allowing any animal (including but not limited to dogs, cats, monkeys, or birds) to 
enter inside Central Dining Areas or Eateries is strictly prohibited 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Written apology + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Penalty will be doubled w.r.t the previous instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 10,000 
 
6. Rule on Hostel Room Occupancy 
Each student is strictly prohibited from allowing any outside person (including friends, family 
members, etc.) to stay in their allotted hostel room without prior intimation.  
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance

members, etc.) to stay in their allotted hostel room without prior intimation.  
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Parents will be informed + monetary penalty*  
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be called + Disciplinary committee 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 5000 
 
7. Smoking within the Institute including Hostel Premises 
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Parents will be informed + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be called + penalty will be doubled w.r.t the previous 
instance 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 1000 
 
8. Possession or Consumption of Alcohol within the Institute including Hostel Premises#  
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Parents will be informed + monetary penalty* 
Subsequent Instances 
Parents will be called + will be sent to the institute’s disciplinary 
committee 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 1000 
#This includes students found under alcohol influence while returning to campus from outside

committee 
*Penalty amount: ₹ 1000

9. Possession or Consumption of prohibited drugs, psychotropic substances, or any other 
intoxicating items within the Institute including Hostel Premises#  
Offence Count 
Consequence 
First Instance 
Parents will be informed + will be sent to the institute’s 
disciplinary committee 
#This includes students found intoxicated while returning to campus from outside

Page | 3  
 
Note:  
1. The hostel authorities reserve the right to impose additional disciplinary actions 
depending on the severity and context of the violation. 
2. For any other violation, appropriate action will be taken by the hostel authorities.
